prd_draft.title: PRD - App - Review Analysis
prd_draft.analysis_goal: Identify user pain points, feature requests, and bug reports for product improvement
prd_draft.background: The app is a fitness application primarily targeting women, offering personalized workout plans. Analysis of user reviews from app stores revealed significant issues that undermine user trust and satisfaction. Despite some positive outcomes for weight loss and motivation, a large number of users report deceptive billing practices, aggressive monetization, intrusive advertisements, login bugs after payment, and declining content quality. These findings indicate a need for immediate improvements to restore trust and enhance the user experience.
prd_draft.problem_statement: Core user problems: (1) Misleading free trial and unauthorized billing erode financial trust. (2) Aggressive paywalling of previously free features frustrates long-time users and feels deceptive. (3) Intrusive ads with hidden close buttons and external redirects make the free tier nearly unusable. (4) Login bugs after payment block access to paid features, causing complete loss of service. (5) Declining content quality and repetitiveness disappoint paying subscribers. (6) Missing requested features (e.g., Apple Watch integration, rep counting, pregnancy-safe workouts) reduce competitiveness and user satisfaction.

user_stories.goal: to clearly understand the trial terms and avoid unexpected charges
user_stories.benefit: I can evaluate the app without financial risk.

user_stories.goal: to reliably access my account after payment
user_stories.benefit: I can use the features I paid for.

user_stories.goal: non-intrusive ads that are easy to close
user_stories.benefit: I can focus on my workouts without disruption.

user_stories.goal: access to some free content and clear communication about what is paid
user_stories.benefit: I feel respected and not misled.
my routine stays effective and interesting.

user_stories.goal: Apple Watch integration to automatically track calories
user_stories.benefit: I can monitor my fitness progress seamlessly.

user_stories.goal: the option to count reps instead of a timer
user_stories.benefit: I can follow my preferred training style.
I can stay active during pregnancy.

requirements.title: Implement transparent billing and free trial display: clearly show trial end dat...
requirements.description: Implement transparent billing and free trial display: clearly show trial end date, ensure no charges before trial ends, fix billing after cancellation, and provide in-app subscription management.
requirements.user_problem: Implement transparent billing and free trial display: clearly show trial end date, ensure no charges before trial ends, fix billing after cancellation, and provide in-app subscription management.
acceptance_criteria: Users see free trial end date and are not charged until after trial ends. Cancellation immediately stops future billing. Subscription management is accessible in-app under Account settings.

requirements.title: Fix login and account access after payment: resolve bug where paid users are tol...
requirements.description: Fix login and account access after payment: resolve bug where paid users are told their account does not exist or are locked out.
requirements.user_problem: Fix login and account access after payment: resolve bug where paid users are told their account does not exist or are locked out.
acceptance_criteria: Paid users can log in immediately after purchase. No 'account does not exist' errors. User session persists across app restarts.

requirements.title: Improve free tier ad experience: reduce ad duration, make close buttons clearly ...
requirements.description: Improve free tier ad experience: reduce ad duration, make close buttons clearly visible, remove redirecting ads, and implement skippable ads after 5 seconds.
requirements.user_problem: Improve free tier ad experience: reduce ad duration, make close buttons clearly visible, remove redirecting ads, and implement skippable ads after 5 seconds.
acceptance_criteria: Max ad length 30 seconds, skippable after 5 seconds. Close button visible and tappable. No external website redirects. Ads do not interrupt workout flow.

requirements.title: Restore select free content and improve paywall communication: make a set of pre...
requirements.description: Restore select free content and improve paywall communication: make a set of previously free workouts accessible again, clearly label what is free vs paid, and avoid bait-and-switch perception.
requirements.user_problem: Restore select free content and improve paywall communication: make a set of previously free workouts accessible again, clearly label what is free vs paid, and avoid bait-and-switch perception.
acceptance_criteria: At least 5 free workouts per category (strength, cardio, yoga). Clear 'Free' vs 'Premium' labels on all workout cards. Previously saved free workouts are restored for affected users.

requirements.title: Enhance content quality and freshness: implement a quality review process for ne...
requirements.description: Enhance content quality and freshness: implement a quality review process for new workouts, ensure variety, and reduce repetitiveness.
requirements.user_problem: Enhance content quality and freshness: implement a quality review process for new workouts, ensure variety, and reduce repetitiveness.
acceptance_criteria: New workouts added weekly with distinct exercises. No consecutive identical workouts in daily recommendations. User feedback option for content quality.

requirements.title: Add Apple Watch integration for automatic calorie tracking during workouts.
requirements.description: Add Apple Watch integration for automatic calorie tracking during workouts.
requirements.user_problem: Add Apple Watch integration for automatic calorie tracking during workouts.
acceptance_criteria: Users can connect Apple Watch in Settings > Integrations. Calories burned appear in workout summary. Data syncs reliably.

requirements.title: Add rep counting option: allow users to switch from a timer to manual rep counti...
requirements.description: Add rep counting option: allow users to switch from a timer to manual rep counting for exercises.
requirements.user_problem: Add rep counting option: allow users to switch from a timer to manual rep counting for exercises.
acceptance_criteria: A toggle appears per exercise during setup. User taps a button to count each rep. Total reps recorded in workout log.

requirements.title: Expand content for special populations: add pregnancy-safe workouts, more diffic...
requirements.description: Expand content for special populations: add pregnancy-safe workouts, more difficulty levels, additional abdominal exercises, and subtle sound indicators.
requirements.user_problem: Expand content for special populations: add pregnancy-safe workouts, more difficulty levels, additional abdominal exercises, and subtle sound indicators.
acceptance_criteria: At least 5 pregnancy-safe workouts. 5 new difficulty levels. 10 new abdominal exercises. Option for subtle sound cues (e.g., short beeps) instead of music.

version_plan.release_goal: Address critical billing, login, and ad issues to restore user trust and basic usability.
version_plan.rationale: All three requirements are P0 or P1 with small-to-medium effort, directly impacting financial trust and core usability.

version_plan.release_goal: Improve content quality and restore some free content to reduce churn among long-time users.
version_plan.rationale: REQ-004 is P1 with large effort, and REQ-005 is P2. Both address user satisfaction and retention.

version_plan.release_goal: Add highly requested features to increase engagement and competitive advantage.
version_plan.rationale: These P3 features include XL effort (Apple Watch) and strategic enhancements that differentiate the app.
